- [ ] Other: <!-- Specify -->

### Priority

- [ ] **Critical** — Blocks review completion entirely
- [ ] **High** — Significantly impacts review quality
- [ ] **Medium** — Can work around but less efficient
- [ ] **Low** — Nice to have, not blocking

<!-- If you have ideas on how to resolve this, share them here -->

<!-- Any temporary solution you're using -->

### Checklist for Admin/Team Lead

- [ ] Review request
- [ ] Assess priority and impact
- [ ] Provide environment update or access
- [ ] Notify reviewer of resolution
- [ ] Verify reviewer can proceed
